sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check last action result
print("Last action result:", last_action_result)

# Check current state more carefully
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAll nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = sorted([p[0] for p in b])
    cols = sorted([p[1] for p in b])
    print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, cols {cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}, hash={n['hash']}")

# Try ACTION7
result = action(['ACTION7'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print("\nAfter ACTION7:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 10:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = sorted([p[0] for p in b])
        cols = sorted([p[1] for p in b])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: {n['pixels']}px, rows {rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, cols {cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}")

print("Level completed:", result.get('level_completed'))
print("Board changed:", result.get('board_changed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
